loop1.title: Battery Health
loop1.note: Showing voltage_avg as a proxy for battery SOC and temperature; output voltage and current are proxied by voltage_avg and current_avg respectively. No dedicated battery temperature or output voltage columns exist in the meter schema.

loop1.title: Battery Health History
loop1.note: Showing electrical load and voltage trends as proxies for battery health sub-scores, as the meter does not log dedicated battery health scores.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness
loop1.note: The UPS asset does not measure battery state-of-charge or transfer readiness scores; the autonomy envelope and backup readiness metrics cannot be computed from the available electrical data.

loop1.title: Backup Readiness History
loop1.note: Showing electrical load proxies (active_power_total_kw) for autonomy, runtime, load pressure, and headroom scores as the dedicated battery metrics are not measured by this meter.

loop2: 'ups-asset-dashboard/battery-autonomy' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Backup Readiness (The UPS asset does not measure battery state-of-charge or transfer readiness scores; the autonomy envelope and backup readiness metrics cannot be computed from the available electrical data.).
